# Version 4.151.0
> **Performance and Skia m151** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 brings Skia m151, broad performance gains, and WASM Emscripten 5.0.6 support. The release merges all upstream Skia m151 bug-fix syncs, cuts allocations across HarfBuzz, SKShaper, and colour-parsing hot paths, and adds the Emscripten 5.0.6 native libraries needed for .NET 11 WASM.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia milestone m151** — Three rounds of upstream chrome/m151 bug-fix merges keep the bundled Skia engine current with Google's latest stable fixes. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294), [#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## API Surface

- **ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads for SKColor hex parsing** — SKColor hex parsing is now faster and gains ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads so callers can avoid intermediate string allocations. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions cleaned up** — Removed an unnecessary unsafe modifier from GRContextOptions, making the type usable without unsafe blocks. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **CPU raster rendering regression fixed** — Restored SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT to resolve a CPU raster regression that appeared after the m151 engine update. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))
- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — Fixed a native handle leak when calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) with a bounds rectangle. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## Platform

- **WASM Emscripten 5.0.6 libraries** — Adds prebuilt Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries and rebuilds the WASM target with the new exnref exception-handling model required by .NET 11. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459), [#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4487](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4487))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Updates HarfBuzzSharp to 14.2.1, eliminates per-call allocations in Tag.Parse, and makes Buffer.AddUtf8(string) allocation-free via pooled UTF-8 encoding.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Added the WASM Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries, ported the Skia submodule bump that drops the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition, and contributed HarfBuzz allocation-free improvements. ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 added broad performance improvements — allocation-free HarfBuzz UTF-8 encoding and Tag parsing, zero-copy SKShaper glyph spans, and optimised SKColor hex parsing — plus WASM Emscripten 5.0.6 support, the CPU raster regression fix, and HarfBuzz 14.2.1.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 landed the Skia m151 engine update, the first round of upstream bug-fix merges, and the Skia submodule bump to drop the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
